en: I don't think you're an arsehole here. No, yeah, I like it. You played the good game.
ko: 나쁜 놈이라고 생각 안 해. 좋은 수를 뒀어. 해산물 데려가고 치킨집 가고 맥앤치즈도 갔지.

en: You took her seafood, then it's chicken shop, then mac and cheese.
Yeah, cos I thought, you're not going to hate me again. But she's not even eating it, so I thought,

en: what the hell, we're not going to keep doing that and keep doing it.
ko: 싫어할 리 없다고 생각했는데 안 먹으니까 이제 그만하자고 했어.

ko: 이게 게임인지 확인하려고. 4일째였으면 어디 갔을 거야? 무료 급식소. 빵이나 먹어.

en: If there was a fourth day, where was you going to take her? Homeless shelter. No. Yeah, yeah.

en: Soup kitchen. Come on, love this bread.
He's a bit of a mug, but I wouldn't say he's, er...

en: I wouldn't say he's an arsehole. Er, I don't know.
ko: 좀 바보 같지만 나쁜 놈은 아니야.

en: Well, let's have a look at some evidence, right? Let's have a look at you in the real world.
OK, this is something you posted on social media.
ko: 증거를 보자. 소셜미디어에 올린 거야. 세상에.

ko: 코미디 센트럴에서 지미 카와 TV 쇼에 나가래.

en: cos apparently I'm f***ing funny, right? I tell good stories and that, you know what I mean?
ko: 내가 재밌대. 이야기를 잘 한대. 찾아왔대.

ko: 내 친구라면 지금 우정 쌓아둬. 곧 잘나갈 거니까.

en: cos I'm about to f*** you behind sausage. LAUGHTER
APPLAUSE Erm...
Can I change my mind? LAUGHTER I mean, if that didn't change your mind, this will.
Oh, no. A lot of questions, and if you really know me, you know my style.
So, when I'm creaming, I like to cream my balls first, right?
And then, I know, you're going to be like, what? I'll do my face afterwards, you know why?

how the f*** are we expecting to rub it in someone else?

en: LAUGHTER LAUGHTER APPLAUSE Talk me through the sexual etiquette there.

en: Listen, I started creaming about ten years ago, Jim.
ko: 그 다음 얼굴에 발라. 왜냐면 내 얼굴에 바르기 싫으면

en: I've got to be honest with you, mate, it's changed my life.
So, I thought, if I'm not comfortable rubbing it in my own face,
how can I expect anybody to be confident rubbing it in their neck?
Well, I would... That's a reason to suck your own d***, man. That's f***ing crazy.

Grace likes you. No! She's a bad judge of character.
